title: Jacea margaritacea
taxonomy: Jacea margaritacea is a type of flowering plant, more specifically it belongs to the family Apiaceae. The genus Jacea is a small group of plants within this family, and Jacea margaritacea is one of the species within this genus. This plant is native to Europe and is also known as meadow-jack or lesser meadow-sweet. In terms of its classification, it is further divided into various ranks, including kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species. Jacea margaritacea is classified as a perennial plant, with its classification being: kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Apiales, family Apiaceae, genus Jacea, and species J. margaritacea.
